title: IC2 Seedbag Display
body:
Displays crop icons on seedbags from IndustrialCraft2.  
Seedbags must be scanned to have their icon shown on the bag.  
Besides IC2, this pack requires Optifine or other mods providing CIT feature to function.  

在IC2的种子包上显示作物图标.种子包需要先扫描,才能显示图标.
除IC2外,此资源包还需要安装Optifine,或其他同样自定义物品贴图功能的模组才能工作.

License:
- You can include this pack in modpacks, and a link to the project page is welcome.
- You can distribute modified version of this pack, but you must include a link back to the project page.

协议:
- 此资源包可以被用于整合包,最好附个到本项目页面的链接.
- 可以修改并二次发布,但必须附上到本项目页面的链接.
